# Geppetto

> Agent-native Solana/Pinocchio engineering workflow: knowledge SDK, CLI workflow contracts, deploy bridge, and audit baseline.

Geppetto helps AI code agents work safely in Solana/Pinocchio repositories by making project knowledge, conventions, validation commands, and deployment outputs explicit.

## Primary Links

- Product home: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/
- Docs overview: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/
- Chinese docs: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/zh/docs/
- Chinese llms.txt: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/zh/llms.txt
- Quickstart: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/quickstart/
- CLI reference: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/cli/
- Audit and review: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/audit/
- Deploy workflow: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/deploy/
- SDK concepts: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/sdk/
- Code review roadmap: https://geppetto-60k.pages.dev/docs/review/
- Source repository: https://github.com/DaviRain-Su/geppetto

## What This Project Is

Geppetto has three product surfaces:

1. Rust crate: Pinocchio-focused knowledge and guardrail SDK.
2. CLI: repo-local workflow contracts for `init`, `new`, `test`, `audit`, and `deploy`.
3. Website/docs: concise product explanation and usage reference for humans and agents.

## Core Commands

```bash
# Validate the static website and project docs contract
bun run docs:check

# Run CLI tests
bun run test

# Run strict audit gate
bun run geppetto:audit:strict

# Preview the website locally
bun run site:preview

# Deploy the website to Cloudflare Pages
bun run site:deploy
```

## CLI Surface

```bash
geppetto-cli init [--dry-run]
geppetto-cli new <project-name>
geppetto-cli test [--skip-examples] [--build-sbf] [--skip-build-sbf]
geppetto-cli audit [--strict] [--locked]
geppetto-cli deploy [--output table|json] [--set key=value] [--write-back]
```

## Agent Coding Rules

When working in a Geppetto or Pinocchio program:

- Import from `geppetto::*`, not directly from `pinocchio::*`.
- Use `guard::*` helpers for all account access and security checks.
- Implement `AccountSchema` for custom state accounts.
- Use single-byte dispatch tags with explicit error handling; do not silently accept unknown tags.
- Check knowledge version headers before copying patterns from source modules.

## Important Source Files

- `src/lib.rs`: crate map, feature matrix, upstream/version guidance.
- `src/guard.rs`: signer, owner, PDA, writable, discriminator, and rent checks.
- `src/schema.rs`: `AccountSchema` layout contract.
- `src/dispatch.rs`: canonical instruction dispatch pattern.
- `src/anti_patterns.rs`: security review anti-patterns.
- `src/idioms/*`: Pinocchio implementation idioms.
- `src/testing/*`: litesvm and mollusk-svm testing guidance.
- `bin/geppetto-cli.ts`: CLI entrypoint.
- `lib/audit.ts`: static audit gate.
- `lib/platform/*`: deploy workflow implementation.
- `site/*`: Cloudflare Pages static product/docs site.

## Current Review Status

`geppetto audit` is a deterministic static gate, not yet a full PR review bot. It currently runs format, compile, and optional clippy checks. The next product step is structured `json|md` findings and executable anti-pattern rules.

## Deployment

The public website is a static Cloudflare Pages site. The output directory is `site`, configured by `wrangler.toml`.
